query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `streaming_status` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `channel_id` INT,
  `status` ENUM('offline','starting','live','paused','ending') DEFAULT 'offline',
  `viewer_count` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `peak_viewers` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `stream_url` TEXT,
  `started_at` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  `ended_at` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `viewer_metrics` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `stream_id` INT,
  `timestamp` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `viewer_count` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `chat_messages` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `engagement_score` DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0,
  `avg_watch_time` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `generated_content` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `type` ENUM('text','image','audio','video') DEFAULT 'text',
  `prompt` TEXT,
  `content` TEXT,
  `file_url` TEXT,
  `status` ENUM('pending','generating','completed','failed') DEFAULT 'pending',
  `metadata` JSON,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `broadcast_chat_commands` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` INT,
  `command` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` TEXT,
  `response_template` TEXT,
  `is_active` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `usage_count` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
